bullets: Russian President Putin warns Ukraine and its allies of 'pushing themselves to the edge' as the conflict marks four years since the full-scale invasion.
US President Trump delivers his first State of the Union address amid low approval ratings ahead of November midterm elections.
A historic blizzard slams the northeastern United States, causing widespread disruptions and power outages.
The director of the Louvre resigns months after a $102 million jewel heist in Paris, France.
The US military seizes a third ship in the Indian Ocean amid rising tensions in the region.
cybercab: Tesla announced a production milestone at its Giga Texas factory for the fully autonomous Cybercab vehicle.
market_mood: US stock markets rebounded sharply on solid economic data and rising consumer confidence, signaling a positive shift in overall global economic sentiment.
hot_spot: The ongoing Russia-Ukraine war, with recent warnings from Putin and a UN General Assembly vote, remains the most urgent geopolitical crisis.
